paper_title: Assessment the impact of climate change on Mekong delta groundwater resources

methods.description: Process for collecting groundwater samples from national monitoring stations and analyzing main cation and anion concentrations, as well as total dissolved solids (TDS), under Vietnamese standards.

steps.description: The study is based on 90 analysis samples in the qp 2-3 aquifers, which were taken from national monitoring stations, the hydro-geological boreholes, the groundwater extraction projects.
steps.searchable_summary: collect groundwater samples from specified locations

steps.description: All groundwater samples were taken and experimented under Vietnamese standards, set by the Division for Water Resources Planning and Investigation for the South of Viet Nam.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze groundwater samples according to Vietnamese standards

methods.description: Statistical methods to determine background values of major anions and cations in groundwater, identify anomalous values using the 3σ error elimination method, and confirm salinity distribution maps.

steps.description: Using statistical analysis methods to determine the background values of major anions and cations in groundwater and TDS.
steps.searchable_summary: perform statistical analysis to find background values of ions

steps.description: Determine anomalous values of the major ions in groundwater (by 3σ errors eliminate method) to confirm the salinity distribution maps.
steps.searchable_summary: identify anomalous ion values using 3σ error elimination

methods.description: Establish ion ratios and use classification methods to determine the origin of groundwater formations, and use hydro-geochemical values to describe on various plots.

steps.description: Based on the chemically reactive of ions, we establish the ratio of rNa + /rCl -, (rCl --rNa + )/rSO4 2-; (rCl --rNa + )/rMg 2+.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate ion ratios for groundwater analysis

steps.description: Use the Xulin classification method to determine originated formation of groundwater in the qp 2-3 aquifer.
steps.searchable_summary: apply Xulin classification to determine groundwater origin

steps.description: Use the hydro-geochemical values in the area describes on the Piper diagram, Gibbs, and Mercado plot.
steps.searchable_summary: visualize hydro-geochemical data on Piper, Gibbs, and Mercado plots
